mapper.select:
SELECT j.id, j.title, j.description, j.requirement, j.status,
j.min_salary AS minSalary, j.max_salary AS maxSalary, j.headcount AS headcount, j.work_location AS workLocation, j.district, j.experience, j.degree, j.tags, j.create_time AS createTime,
-- 公司信息映射 COALESCE(m.company_name, '未认证企业') AS companyName, COALESCE(m.company_logo, u.avatar) AS companyLogo, COALESCE(m.scale, '100-499人') AS companyScale, COALESCE(m.industry, '互联网') AS companyIndustry, COALESCE(m.address, CONCAT(j.work_location, IFNULL(j.district, ''))) AS companyAddress,
-- 发布者信息映射 COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username, '招聘官') AS publisherName, u.avatar AS publisherAvatar, u.id AS publisherId, '招聘负责人' AS publisherTitle,
-- 分类信息 c.category_name AS categoryName, j.category_id AS categoryId
FROM job_post j LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON j.merchant_id = u.id LEFT JOIN merchant_profile m ON u.id = m.user_id LEFT JOIN job_category c ON j.category_id = c.id WHERE j.id = #{id} AND j.audit_status = 1

SELECT j.id, j.title, COALESCE(m.company_name, '未认证企业') AS companyName, j.work_location AS location, CONCAT(j.min_salary, '-', j.max_salary, 'K') AS salary, j.headcount AS headcount, j.tags, j.audit_status AS auditStatus, j.audit_reason AS reason, j.create_time AS createdAt, j.last_edit_summary AS lastEditSummary, j.last_edit_time AS lastEditTime FROM job_post j LEFT JOIN merchant_profile m ON j.merchant_id = m.user_id WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( j.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(m.company_name, '未认证企业') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND j.audit_status = #{status}
ORDER BY
CASE WHEN j.audit_status = 1 THEN 1 WHEN j.audit_status = 0 THEN 2 WHEN j.audit_status = 2 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END ASC, j.create_time
ASC DESC DESC
j.create_time
ASC DESC DESC
j.create_time DESC
